scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply owostack --local && wrangler d1 migrations apply owostack-auth --local
scripts.db:migrate:auth: wrangler d1 migrations apply owostack-auth --remote --env live
scripts.db:migrate:test: wrangler d1 migrations apply owostack-test --remote --env test
scripts.db:migrate:live: wrangler d1 migrations apply owostack-live --remote --env live
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm db:migrate:auth && pnpm db:migrate:test && pnpm db:migrate:live
